description_long: This is a silhouette of an adult female pedestrian standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure has a slender build, with a defined waist and hips, and is wearing a fitted dress that reaches above the knees. The person is wearing high-heeled shoes, which are clearly visible in the side views. The hairstyle is short and voluminous, with the hair ending above the shoulders and styled away from the face. The overall posture is balanced and symmetrical, with no visible accessories or carried objects. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a modern, urban context, suitable for city streets or sidewalks.
description: A slender adult female figure in a fitted dress and high heels, standing in a T-pose with short, voluminous hair. The silhouette is modern and urban, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-pose, fitted dress, and high-heeled shoes; facial features and hairstyle outline are visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, high heels, and the short, voluminous hairstyle.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the dress's fit, the back of the hairstyle, and the symmetry of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the dress, high heels, and hairstyle.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
